_comment: Hand-authored oracle for na-jungle.json. championId aliases read directly from data/raw/cdragon-champions.json (numericId->alias), NOT generated by canonicalizeEntries. role 1 -> jungle. games=totalMatches, lastPlayed/recentWindowGames null (no timestamp on this endpoint). Order matches input order. Only the queueType=420 block contributes; the empty 440 block is ignored.
